g.text: Each tile shows the best fixed memory under an OpenFOAM objective-weight regime.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #102a43

g.text: But pair-heavy validation still selects learned context

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #102a43

g.text: OpenFOAM strengthens the memory used by the physics kernel

text.style: font-size: 9.3px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #475569

g.text: Higher flow fidelity increases velocity autocorrelation and shifts the strongest fixed memory toward velocity memory.
